info.title: Leave API
info.description:
API for managing leave requests in the HRM module.

## Authentication
All endpoints require Bearer Token (JWT) authentication.

## Response Format
All responses follow this structure:
```json
{
  "status": 1,
  "message": "string",
  "data": {}
}
```

- **status**: 1 for success, 0 for error
- **message**: Error or success message
- **data**: Response data (optional)

## Error Codes
- 403: Permission denied / Validation error
- 404: Resource not found
- 500: Server error

employee_id.description: Employee ID associated with the leave

user_id.description: User ID associated with the leave

allowed_days.description: Total days allowed for this leave type

StoreLeaveRequest.description: Request body for creating a new leave

leave_type_id.description: ID of the leave type. Required field. Use GET /api/Hrm/leaves-types to retrieve available leave types.

start_date.description: Leave start date. Required field. Must be after yesterday. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

end_date.description: Leave end date. Required field. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

leave_reason.description: Reason for leave. Required field. Describe the reason for taking leave.

remark.description: Additional remarks. Required field. Any additional information about the leave.

employee_id.description: Employee ID. Optional field. Only used when admin/company is creating leave for another employee. If not provided, current authenticated user's leave will be created.

status.description: Leave status. Optional field. Defaults to 'Pending'. Only used for admin/company to set initial status.

leave_type_id.description: ID of the leave type. Required field. Use GET /api/Hrm/leaves-types to retrieve available leave types.

remark.description: Additional remarks. Required field. Any additional information about the leave.

status.description: Leave status. Optional field. Defaults to 'Pending'. Only used for admin/company to set initial status.

UpdateLeaveRequest.description: Request body for updating an existing leave

leave_type_id.description: ID of the leave type. Required field. Use GET /api/Hrm/leaves-types to retrieve available leave types.

start_date.description: Leave start date. Required field. Must be after yesterday. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

end_date.description: Leave end date. Required field. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

leave_reason.description: Reason for leave. Required field. Describe the reason for taking leave.

remark.description: Additional remarks. Required field. Any additional information about the leave.

leave_type_id.description: ID of the leave type. Required field. Use GET /api/Hrm/leaves-types to retrieve available leave types.

start_date.description: Leave start date. Required field. Must be after yesterday. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

end_date.description: Leave end date. Required field. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

leave_reason.description: Reason for leave. Required field. Describe the reason for taking leave.

remark.description: Additional remarks. Required field. Any additional information about the leave.

ChangeStatusRequest.description: Request body for changing leave status

leave_id.description: ID of the leave to update. Required field. The leave ID to change status for.

status.description: New status for the leave. Required field. One of: Approved, Reject, Partially Approved

approved_days.description: Number of approved days. Optional field. Required when status is 'Partially Approved'. Must be between 1 and total leave days.

status_reason.description: Reason for status change. Optional field. Provide a reason or comment for the status update.
status_reason.example: Approved with partial days due to staffing needs

Employee ID. Required field. ID of the employee to get leave summary for.

get.description:
Retrieves all leave records. 
- Admin/company users see all leaves
- Regular employees see only their own leaves

example.message: Something went wrong: Internal server error

post.description:
Creates a new leave request.

--- MOBILE DEVELOPER FORM-DATA GUIDE ---

ALWAYS REQUIRED (include in every request):
- leave_type_id (integer): ID of the leave type
- start_date (string): Leave start date in YYYY-MM-DD format
- end_date (string): Leave end date in YYYY-MM-DD format
- leave_reason (string): Reason for leave
- remark (string): Additional remarks

OPTIONAL FIELDS:
- employee_id (integer): Only used when admin/company is creating leave for another employee
- status (string): Defaults to Pending - enum: Pending, Approved, Reject

leave_type_id.description: ID of the leave type (ALWAYS REQUIRED)

start_date.description: Leave start date in YYYY-MM-DD format (ALWAYS REQUIRED)

end_date.description: Leave end date in YYYY-MM-DD format (ALWAYS REQUIRED)

employee_id.description: Employee ID - only used when admin/company is creating leave for another employee (OPTIONAL)

example.message: You are not eligible for this leave. Maximum days remaining: 5

404.description: Leave type or employee not found

example.message: Something went wrong: Internal server error

get.description:
Retrieves a specific leave record by ID.

## Authorization
- Admin/company can view any leave
- Regular employees can only view their own leaves

put.description:
Updates an existing leave request.

--- MOBILE DEVELOPER FORM-DATA GUIDE ---

ALWAYS REQUIRED (include in every request):
- leave_type_id (integer): ID of the leave type
- start_date (string): Leave start date in YYYY-MM-DD format
- end_date (string): Leave end date in YYYY-MM-DD format
- leave_reason (string): Reason for leave
- remark (string): Additional remarks

NOTE: Only pending leave requests can be updated.

leave_type_id.description: ID of the leave type (ALWAYS REQUIRED)

start_date.description: Leave start date in YYYY-MM-DD format (ALWAYS REQUIRED)

end_date.description: Leave end date in YYYY-MM-DD format (ALWAYS REQUIRED)

example.message: Only pending leave requests can be updated

delete.description:
Deletes a leave request.

## Restrictions
- Only pending leave requests can be deleted
- Only the leave owner or admin can delete

example.message: Only pending leave requests can be deleted

get.summary: Get leave details with employee info and leave balance
get.description:
Retrieves detailed leave information including:
- Leave record
- Employee details
- Leave type details
- Used days
- Remaining days
- Sundays worked

## Authorization
Requires approver permission (admin/company).

404.description: Leave or leave type not found

post.description:
Changes the status of a leave request.

--- MOBILE DEVELOPER FORM-DATA GUIDE ---

ALWAYS REQUIRED (include in every request):
- leave_id (integer): ID of the leave
- status (string): New status - enum: Approved, Reject, Partially Approved

OPTIONAL FIELDS:
- approved_days (integer): Required when status=Partially Approved
- status_reason (string): Reason for status change

NOTE: Requires approver permission (admin/company).

leave_id.description: ID of the leave to update (ALWAYS REQUIRED)

status.description: New status for the leave (ALWAYS REQUIRED)

approved_days.description: Number of approved days - required when status=Partially Approved (OPTIONAL)

status_reason.example: Approved with partial days due to staffing needs

post.summary: Get leave summary for an employee
post.description:
Retrieves leave usage summary for an employee grouped by leave type.

--- MOBILE DEVELOPER FORM-DATA GUIDE ---

ALWAYS REQUIRED (include in every request):
- employee_id (integer): ID of the employee to get leave summary for

RESPONSE FIELDS:
- id: Leave type ID
- title: Leave type title
- allowed_days: Total days allowed
- used_days: Days used so far
- remaining_days: Days remaining

get.description:
Retrieves the leave reason and remarks for a leave request.

## Response Fields
- leave_reason: Reason for taking leave
- remark: Additional remarks

## Authorization
- Admin/company can view any leave description
- Regular employees can view their own leave description

Retrieves the status and status reason for a leave request.

## Response Fields
- status: Current leave status
- status_reason: Reason for status change

## Authorization
- Admin/company can view any leave status
- Regular employees can view their own leave status
